sections.paragraph:
Original: היא הוּא

Transliteration: hû' hı̂y'

Phonetic: hoo

BDB Definition:

  1. he, she, it
    1. (emphasizing and resuming subject)
    2. (anticipating subject)
    3. as demonstrative pronoun
    4. (relative)
    5. (affirming existence)

Origin: corresponding to H1931

TWOT entry: 2693

Part(s) of speech:
